title: Oil prices near pre-war levels  —  but persistent supply risks could spark a rebound, analysts warn
summary_full: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.
summary_public: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.
